requirements.evidence: Host `:app:testDebugUnitTest` passed, but [android/app/src/main/java/com/laneshadow/ui/molecules/LSToolbar.kt](/Users/justinrich/Projects/LaneShadow/.kb-run/worktrees/UC-MOL-02-android/android/app/src/main/java/com/laneshadow/ui/molecules/LSToolbar.kt:61) derives toolbar height as `space.xxxxl - space.sm` instead of reading a toolbar component token, and [android/app/src/test/java/com/laneshadow/ui/molecules/LSToolbarTest.kt](/Users/justinrich/Projects/LaneShadow/.kb-run/worktrees/UC-MOL-02-android/android/app/src/test/java/com/laneshadow/ui/molecules/LSToolbarTest.kt:53) only asserts background key presence plus node existence rather than exact `surface.primary`, ghost-button composition, centered title behavior, and real token-backed height.
requirements.remediation: Expose/use `sizing.component.toolbarHeight` on the Android theme surface (or generated token surface) and update `default_render_uses_chrome_tokens` to assert exact height/background/button semantics instead of shared synthetic semantics.

TypographyVariant.Opinion.Lg ...)`, and host `:app:testDebugUnitTest --tests "com.laneshadow.ui.molecules.LSNavHeaderTest"` passed `large_title_variant_uses_opinion_lg_typography`.

[android/app/src/main/java/com/laneshadow/ui/molecules/LSNavHeader.kt](/Users/justinrich/Projects/LaneShadow/.kb-run/worktrees/UC-MOL-02-android/android/app/src/main/java/com/laneshadow/ui/molecules/LSNavHeader.kt:141) uses `Arrangement.spacedBy(style.subtitleGap)` and tertiary subtitle text, but [android/app/src/test/java/com/laneshadow/ui/molecules/LSNavHeaderTest.kt](/Users/justinrich/Projects/LaneShadow/.kb-run/worktrees/UC-MOL-02-android/android/app/src/test/java/com/laneshadow/ui/molecules/LSNavHeaderTest.kt:60) only checks title/subtitle variant semantics and color-key presence; it never proves the spacing contract or exact subtitle token value.
requirements.remediation: Strengthen `large_title_with_subtitle_renders_both_nodes` to assert exact `LSNavHeaderVerticalGapKey` and exact subtitle color/token semantics, not only key existence.

requirements.evidence: Host `:app:connectedDebugAndroidTest -Pandroid.testInstrumentationRunnerArguments.class=com.laneshadow.ui.molecules.LSToolbarUiTest` failed only because no device/emulator was attached, but the test itself in [android/app/src/androidTest/java/com/laneshadow/ui/molecules/LSToolbarUiTest.kt](/Users/justinrich/Projects/LaneShadow/.kb-run/worktrees/UC-MOL-02-android/android/app/src/androidTest/java/com/laneshadow/ui/molecules/LSToolbarUiTest.kt:23) does not inject simulated system-bar insets and only asserts `toolbarBounds.top > 0f`, which is not a reliable proof that `WindowInsets.systemBars` handling is correct.
requirements.remediation: Rewrite the instrumentation test to inject known insets or compare against a control without `windowInsetsPadding`, then rerun it on an attached emulator/device.

requirements.evidence: Story grep across [LSToolbarStory.kt](/Users/justinrich/Projects/LaneShadow/.kb-run/worktrees/UC-MOL-02-android/android/app/src/debug/java/com/laneshadow/sandbox/stories/molecules/LSToolbarStory.kt:12) and [LSNavHeaderStory.kt](/Users/justinrich/Projects/LaneShadow/.kb-run/worktrees/UC-MOL-02-android/android/app/src/debug/java/com/laneshadow/sandbox/stories/molecules/LSNavHeaderStory.kt:9) returns 7 IDs total, and grep found no literal `Color(0xFF...)` in [LSToolbar.kt](/Users/justinrich/Projects/LaneShadow/.kb-run/worktrees/UC-MOL-02-android/android/app/src/main/java/com/laneshadow/ui/molecules/LSToolbar.kt:1) or [LSNavHeader.kt](/Users/justinrich/Projects/LaneShadow/.kb-run/worktrees/UC-MOL-02-android/android/app/src/main/java/com/laneshadow/ui/molecules/LSNavHeader.kt:1).

findings.evidence: The toolbar height contract is implemented with a local bridge: `toolbarHeight = space.xxxxl - space.sm`. The token source exists in `tokens/semantic/dimensions.tokens.json` as `sizing.component.toolbarHeight = 56`, but the molecule does not read a toolbar component token/API.
findings.fix: Expose component sizing on `LaneShadowThemeValues` (or use generated component sizing directly) and resolve toolbar/nav-header heights from `sizing.component.toolbarHeight` rather than reconstructing them from spacing rungs.

findings.evidence: `window_insets_system_bars_respected` only checks `toolbarBounds.top > 0f` after normal composition. It never injects fake status-bar insets or compares against a non-inset control, so even with a device attached it would not specifically prove `WindowInsets.systemBars` behavior.
findings.fix: Make the UI test drive known inset values or compare two compositions (with and without `windowInsetsPadding`) and assert the exact top offset introduced by system bars.

findings.evidence: The subtitle test asserts title/subtitle variant keys and mere presence of `LSNavHeaderSubtitleColorKey`, but it never checks `LSNavHeaderVerticalGapKey` or the exact tertiary subtitle token value required by the spacing/color contract.
findings.fix: Assert the exact vertical-gap semantics and exact subtitle color/token in `large_title_with_subtitle_renders_both_nodes`.

findings.evidence: `default_render_uses_chrome_tokens` only verifies semantics-key presence for background and insets, plus node existence for title/back/action. It does not assert exact `surface.primary`, ghost-button composition, or centered-title behavior, so the test overstates what it proves.
findings.fix: Add exact-value assertions for background color and button semantics, and assert centering/layout behavior instead of relying on tag/content-description presence alone.

summary: NEEDS_FIXES: story coverage and no-literal-color gates pass, but AC-1, AC-4, and AC-5 are not fully satisfied because toolbar height is reconstructed instead of token-backed, the nav-header subtitle test does not verify spacing/color precisely, and the instrumentation test does not actually prove WindowInsets handling.
